assertions.value: Displays an ASCII art banner for the hoist skill before doing anything else
Uses npm OIDC trusted publishing with no stored NODE_AUTH_TOKEN
Guards publish with a version-already-exists check so re-runs are idempotent

name: binaries-release
prompt: /hoist for a Go CLI that ships cross-platform binaries

assertions.value: Builds cross-platform binaries in a matrix and produces SHA256SUMS checksums
Attaches the artifacts to a GitHub Release

name: auto-bump-approval
prompt: /hoist an npm package, auto-bump on merge to main with an approval gate before publishing

assertions.value: Auto-computes the next version and publishes on merge to the default branch
Runs the publish step behind an environment approval gate requiring a human reviewer
Generates a deploy/SETUP.md describing the required one-time setup
